steps.title: Find the shared input
steps.content:
For $p$, the slope is $6$. Use the change from $p(c)=-8$ to $p(4)=28$:
$$
\frac{28-(-8)}{4-c}=6
$$

steps.title: Use the two points for slope
steps.content: For $t$, the two points are $(-2,-7)$ and $(4,35)$. The slope is $$ \frac{35-(-7)}{4-(-2)}=\frac{42}{6}=7 $$ The answer is D.
